source: #### Setup Config Parameters

from pyspark.sql import Window
from pyspark.sql.functions import col, row_number, when, sha2, concat_ws

# Environment Parameter
env = 'prod'

# Config for updating keys in Bronze
bronze_tables_config = [
    {
        "table_detail": "marano_bronze.marano_bulk_fuel_transactions",
        "table_detail_bkup": "marano_bronze.marano_bulk_fuel_transactions_bkup",
        "table_name": "marano_bulk_fuel_transactions",
        "path": f"abfss://bronze@cql{env}datahubsynapse.dfs.core.windows.net/esg_sharepoint_bronze/marano/marano_bulk_fuel_transactions",
        "bkup_path": f"abfss://bronze@cql{env}datahubsynapse.dfs.core.windows.net/esg_sharepoint_bronze/marano/marano_bulk_fuel_transactions_bkup",
        "format": "delta",
        "hash_columns": ["SiteCode","InvoiceNumber","InvoiceDate","DocketNumber","FileRowIndex"],
        "old_hash_column": "HashKey",
        "drop_old_hashkey": "OLD_HashKey"
    }, 
    {   
        "table_detail": "marano_bronze.marano_fuel_transactions",
        "table_detail_bkup": "marano_bronze.marano_fuel_transactions_bkup",
        "table_name": "marano_fuel_transactions",
        "path": f"abfss://bronze@cql{env}datahubsynapse.dfs.core.windows.net/esg_sharepoint_bronze/marano/marano_fuel_transactions",
        "bkup_path": f"abfss://bronze@cql{env}datahubsynapse.dfs.core.windows.net/esg_sharepoint_bronze/marano/marano_fuel_transactions_bkup",
        "format": "delta", 
        "hash_columns": ["SiteCode","InvoiceDate","InvoiceNumber","SupplyPoint","TransactionDate","Product", "Quantity","FileRowIndex"],
        "old_hash_column": "HashKey",
        "drop_old_hashkey": "OLD_HashKey"
    },
    {
        "table_detail": "ergon_bronze.ergon_invoice_details",
        "table_detail_bkup": "ergon_bronze.ergon_invoice_details_bkup",
        "table_name": "ergon_invoice_details",
        "path": f"abfss://bronze@cql{env}datahubsynapse.dfs.core.windows.net/esg_sharepoint_bronze/ergon/ergon_invoice_details",
        "bkup_path": f"abfss://bronze@cql{env}datahubsynapse.dfs.core.windows.net/esg_sharepoint_bronze/ergon/ergon_invoice_details_bkup",
        "format": "delta",
        "hash_columns": ["SiteCode","InvoiceNumber","InvoiceDate","FileRowIndex"],
        "old_hash_column": "HashKey",
        "drop_old_hashkey": "OLD_HashKey"
    }, 
    {
        "table_detail": "ergon_bronze.ergon_charge_details",
        "table_detail_bkup": "ergon_bronze.ergon_charge_details_bkup",
        "table_name": "ergon_charge_details",
        "path": f"abfss://bronze@cql{env}datahubsynapse.dfs.core.windows.net/esg_sharepoint_bronze/ergon/ergon_charge_details",
        "bkup_path": f"abfss://bronze@cql{env}datahubsynapse.dfs.core.windows.net/esg_sharepoint_bronze/ergon/ergon_charge_details_bkup",
        "format": "delta",
        "hash_columns": ["SiteCode","InvoiceNumber","InvoiceDate","BillingPeriod","ChargeType","FileRowIndex","NumberOfBillingDays","QuantityKWH"],
        "old_hash_column": "HashKey",
        "drop_old_hashkey": "OLD_HashKey"
    }, 
    {
        "table_detail": "origin_bronze.origin_invoice_details",
        "table_detail_bkup": "origin_bronze.origin_invoice_details_bkup",
        "table_name": "origin_invoice_details",
        "path": f"abfss://bronze@cql{env}datahubsynapse.dfs.core.windows.net/esg_sharepoint_bronze/origin/origin_invoice_details",
        "bkup_path": f"abfss://bronze@cql{env}datahubsynapse.dfs.core.windows.net/esg_sharepoint_bronze/origin/origin_invoice_details_bkup",
        "format": "delta",
        "hash_columns": ["SiteCode","InvoiceNumber","InvoiceDate","FileRowIndex"],
        "old_hash_column": "HashKey",
        "drop_old_hashkey": "OLD_HashKey"
    }, 
    {
        "table_detail": "origin_bronze.origin_charge_details",
        "table_detail_bkup": "origin_bronze.origin_charge_details_bkup",
        "table_name": "origin_charge_details",
        "path": f"abfss://bronze@cql{env}datahubsynapse.dfs.core.windows.net/esg_sharepoint_bronze/origin/origin_charge_details",
        "bkup_path": f"abfss://bronze@cql{env}datahubsynapse.dfs.core.windows.net/esg_sharepoint_bronze/origin/origin_charge_details_bkup",
        "format": "delta",
        "hash_columns": ["SiteCode","InvoiceNumber","InvoiceDate","BillingPeriod","ChargeType","QuantityKWH","FileRowIndex"],
        "old_hash_column": "HashKey",
        "drop_old_hashkey": "OLD_HashKey"
    }, 
    {
         "table_detail": "origin_bronze.origin_meter_details",
         "table_detail_bkup": "origin_bronze.origin_meter_details_bkup",
         "table_name": "origin_meter_details",
         "path": f"abfss://bronze@cql{env}datahubsynapse.dfs.core.windows.net/esg_sharepoint_bronze/origin/origin_meter_details",
         "bkup_path": f"abfss://bronze@cql{env}datahubsynapse.dfs.core.windows.net/esg_sharepoint_bronze/origin/origin_meter_details_bkup",
         "format": "delta",
         "hash_columns": ["SiteCode","InvoiceNumber","InvoiceDate","MeterNumber","StartRead","FileRowIndex"],
         "old_hash_column": "HashKey",
         "drop_old_hashkey": "OLD_HashKey"
    }, 
    {
         "table_detail": "cbre_bronze.cbre_meter_details",
         "table_detail_bkup": "cbre_bronze.cbre_meter_details_bkup",
         "table_name": "cbre_meter_details",
         "path": f"abfss://bronze@cql{env}datahubsynapse.dfs.core.windows.net/esg_sharepoint_bronze/cbre/cbre_meter_details",
         "bkup_path": f"abfss://bronze@cql{env}datahubsynapse.dfs.core.windows.net/esg_sharepoint_bronze/cbre/cbre_meter_details_bkup",
         "format": "delta",
         "hash_columns": ["SiteCode","LocationIdentifier","LineNumber","TenantDetails","PreviousReadDate","CurrentReadDate","FileRowIndex"],
         "old_hash_column": "HashKey",
         "drop_old_hashkey": "OLD_HashKey"
    }
]

# Config for Silver Backup
silver_tables_config = [
    {
        "table_detail": "silver.fuel_transactions",
        "table_detail_bkup": "silver.fuel_transactions_bkup",
        "table_name": "fuel_transactions",
        "path": f"abfss://silver@cql{env}datahubsynapse.dfs.core.windows.net/fuel_transactions/fuel_transactions",
        "bkup_path": f"abfss://silver@cql{env}datahubsynapse.dfs.core.windows.net/fuel_transactions_bkup/fuel_transactions_bkup",
        "format": "delta"
    }, 
    {
        "table_detail": "silver.retail_electricity_charge_details",
        "table_detail_bkup": "silver.retail_electricity_charge_details_bkup",
        "table_name": "retail_electricity_charge_details",
        "path": f"abfss://silver@cql{env}datahubsynapse.dfs.core.windows.net/retail_electricity_charge_details/retail_electricity_charge_details",
        "bkup_path": f"abfss://silver@cql{env}datahubsynapse.dfs.core.windows.net/retail_electricity_charge_details_bkup/retail_electricity_charge_details_bkup",
        "format": "delta"
    }
#### Create Backup Tables (Frozen Cells)

#Create backups (bronze)
for config in bronze_tables_config:
    df = spark.read.table(config["table_detail"])
    df.write.format(config["format"]).mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(config["table_detail_bkup"])
    print(f"Backup created for: {config['table_name']}")

#Create backups (silver)
for config in silver_tables_config:
    df = spark.read.table(config["table_detail"])
    df.write.format(config["format"]).mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(config["table_detail_bkup"])
    print(f"Backup created for: {config['table_name']}")
#### Restore From Backup Tables (Frozen Cells)

#Restore backups (bronze)
for config in bronze_tables_config:
    df = spark.read.table(config["table_detail_bkup"])
    df.write.format(config["format"]).mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(config["table_detail"])
    print(f"Backup restored for: {config['table_name']}")

#Restore backups (silver)
for config in silver_tables_config:
    df = spark.read.table(config["table_detail_bkup"])
    df.write.format(config["format"]).mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(config["table_detail"])
    print(f"Backup restored for: {config['table_name']}")
#### Validation Queries - Before Updates

# ERGON Validation
validation_query = """
SELECT 
    count(1),
    InvoiceNumber,
    InvoiceDate,
    NationalMeteringIdentifier,
    CDCCurrentFlag
FROM ergon_bronze.ergon_invoice_details
WHERE
    CDCCurrentFlag = 1
GROUP BY
    InvoiceNumber,
    InvoiceDate,
    NationalMeteringIdentifier,
    CDCCurrentFlag  
HAVING count(1) > 1 
order by InvoiceNumber
"""
validation_df = spark.sql(validation_query)
validation_df.show()

#Detailed check
validation_query_detail = """
SELECT SourceFileID, InvoiceNumber, InvoiceDate, NationalMeteringIdentifier, HashKey, CDCCurrentFlag
      FROM ergon_bronze.ergon_invoice_details
WHERE
    CDCCurrentFlag = 1
order by InvoiceNumber
"""
validation_df_detail = spark.sql(validation_query_detail)
display(validation_df_detail)

# Origin Validation
validation_query = """
SELECT 
    count(1),
    InvoiceNumber,
    InvoiceDate,
    NationalMeteringIdentifier,
    CDCCurrentFlag
FROM origin_bronze.origin_invoice_details
WHERE
    CDCCurrentFlag = 1
GROUP BY 
    InvoiceNumber,
    InvoiceDate,
    NationalMeteringIdentifier,
    CDCCurrentFlag
HAVING count(1) > 1 
ORDER BY InvoiceNumber 
"""
validation_df = spark.sql(validation_query)
validation_df.show()

#Detailed check
validation_query_detail = """
SELECT *
      FROM origin_bronze.origin_invoice_details
WHERE
    CDCCurrentFlag = 1
ORDER BY InvoiceNumber 
"""
validation_df_detail = spark.sql(validation_query_detail)
display(validation_df_detail)

# CBRE Validation
validation_query = """
SELECT 
    count(distinct SourceFileID),
    LocationIdentifier,
    PreviousReadDate,
    CurrentReadDate,
    CDCCurrentFlag
FROM cbre_bronze.cbre_meter_details
WHERE
    CDCCurrentFlag = 1
GROUP BY
    LocationIdentifier,
    PreviousReadDate,
    CurrentReadDate,
    CDCCurrentFlag
HAVING count(distinct SourceFileID) > 1 
ORDER BY CurrentReadDate desc
"""
validation_df = spark.sql(validation_query)
validation_df.show()

#Detailed check
validation_query_detail = """
SELECT *
      FROM cbre_bronze.cbre_meter_details
WHERE
    CDCCurrentFlag = 1
ORDER BY CurrentReadDate desc
"""
validation_df_detail = spark.sql(validation_query_detail)
display(validation_df_detail)

# Marano Validation
validation_query = """
SELECT 
    count(distinct SourceFileID),
    InvoiceDate,
    CDCCurrentFlag
FROM marano_bronze.marano_fuel_transactions
WHERE
    CDCCurrentFlag = 1
GROUP BY
    InvoiceDate,
    CDCCurrentFlag
HAVING count(distinct SourceFileID) > 1 

"""
validation_df = spark.sql(validation_query)
validation_df.show()

#Detailed check
validation_query_detail = """
SELECT *
FROM marano_bronze.marano_fuel_transactions
WHERE
    CDCCurrentFlag = 1
ORDER BY Quantity desc

"""
validation_df_detail = spark.sql(validation_query_detail)
display(validation_df_detail)

# Marano Bulk Validation
validation_query = """
SELECT 
    count(distinct SourceFileID),
    InvoiceDate,
    CDCCurrentFlag
FROM marano_bronze.marano_bulk_fuel_transactions
GROUP BY
    InvoiceDate,
    CDCCurrentFlag
    having count(distinct SourceFileID) > 1
"""
validation_df = spark.sql(validation_query)
validation_df.show()

#Detailed check
validation_query_detail = """
SELECT *
FROM marano_bronze.marano_bulk_fuel_transactions
WHERE
    CDCCurrentFlag = 1
ORDER BY Quantity desc

"""
validation_df_detail = spark.sql(validation_query_detail)
display(validation_df_detail)

#Silver Validation Ergon and Origin
spark.conf.set("spark.sql.legacy.timeParserPolicy", "LEGACY")
validation_query = """
select
s.* 
from
silver.retail_electricity_charge_details s
join
(
SELECT distinct
    InvoiceNumber
FROM origin_bronze.origin_invoice_details_bkup
WHERE
    CDCCurrentFlag = 1
GROUP BY 
    InvoiceNumber,
    InvoiceDate,
    NationalMeteringIdentifier,
    CDCCurrentFlag
HAVING count(1) > 1  
union
SELECT distinct
    InvoiceNumber
FROM ergon_bronze.ergon_invoice_details_bkup
WHERE
    CDCCurrentFlag = 1
GROUP BY 
    InvoiceNumber,
    InvoiceDate,
    NationalMeteringIdentifier,
    CDCCurrentFlag
HAVING count(1) > 1  
) b on b.InvoiceNumber = s.InvoiceNumber
order by 
s.InvoiceNumber
"""
validation_df = spark.sql(validation_query)
display(validation_df)

#Silver Validation CBRE
spark.conf.set("spark.sql.legacy.timeParserPolicy", "LEGACY")
validation_query = """
select
s.* 
from
silver.retail_electricity_charge_details s
join
(
SELECT 
    LocationIdentifier,
    date_format(to_date(PreviousReadDate, 'dd/MM/yyyy'), 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS PreviousReadDate,
    date_format(to_date(CurrentReadDate, 'dd/MM/yyyy'), 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS CurrentReadDate
FROM cbre_bronze.cbre_meter_details_bkup
WHERE
    CDCCurrentFlag = 1
GROUP BY
    LocationIdentifier,
    PreviousReadDate,
    CurrentReadDate
HAVING count(distinct SourceFileID) > 1 
) b on b.LocationIdentifier = s.LocationIdentifier and b.PreviousReadDate = s.BillingPeriodStartDate and b.CurrentReadDate = s.BillingPeriodEndDate
order by 
s.LocationIdentifier,
s.BillingPeriodStartDate,
s.BillingPeriodEndDate
"""
validation_df = spark.sql(validation_query)
display(validation_df)
#### Perform Table Updates

# START
for config in bronze_tables_config:

    df = spark.read.format(config["format"]).load(config["path"])

    # Rename old hash key column
    df = df.withColumnRenamed(config["old_hash_column"], "OLD_HashKey")

    # Generate new hash key column 
    df = df.withColumn("HashKey", sha2(concat_ws("||", *[df[col] for col in config["hash_columns"]]), 256))

    # Window spec: partition by new hashkey, order by descending SourceFileID
    window_spec = Window.partitionBy("HashKey").orderBy(col("SourceFileId").desc())

    # Apply logic to CDCCurrentFlag as FALSE for the duplicate records in Bronze (FLAG OPTION)
    #df = (df.withColumn("row_num", row_number().over(window_spec)).withColumn("CDCCurrentFlag", when(col("row_num") == 1, True).otherwise(False)).drop("row_num"))

    # Delete duplicate records before overwriting table (DELETE OPTION)
    df = (df.withColumn("row_num", row_number().over(window_spec)).withColumn("CDCOps", when(col("row_num") != 1, "3").otherwise(col("CDCOps"))).drop("row_num"))
    df = df.filter(df["CDCOps"] != '3')

    # Drop old hashkey column
    df = df.drop(config["drop_old_hashkey"])

    #Check for any duplicate HashKeys before overwriting table
    duplicate_hash_df = (df.where(col("CDCCurrentFlag") == True).groupBy("HashKey").count().filter("count > 1").orderBy("count", ascending=False))

    if duplicate_hash_df.count() > 0:
        raise ValueError(f"Loop failed: HashKey (New) duplicates count = {duplicate_hash_df} for: {config['table_name']}")
    
    else: 
        print(f"No duplicates found, proceeding with overwrite for: {config['table_name']}")
        df.write.format(config["format"]).mode("overwrite").option("overwriteSchema", "true").save(config["path"])
        print(f"Overwrite complete")

# END
#### Drop Silver Tables

#file_path = f'abfss://silver@cql{env}datahubsynapse.dfs.core.windows.net/fuel_transactions/fuel_transactions'
#mssparkutils.fs.rm(file_path, recurse=True) 
#mssparkutils.fs.mkdirs(file_path)
spark.sql(f"""DROP TABLE silver.fuel_transactions;""")

#file_path = f'abfss://silver@cql{env}datahubsynapse.dfs.core.windows.net/retail_electricity_charge_details/retail_electricity_charge_details'
#mssparkutils.fs.rm(file_path, recurse=True)
#mssparkutils.fs.mkdirs(file_path)
spark.sql(f"""DROP TABLE silver.retail_electricity_charge_details;""")
#### Drop Gold Tables

#file_path = f'abfss://gold@cql{env}datahubsynapse.dfs.core.windows.net/fact_fuel_consumption/fact_fuel_consumption'
#mssparkutils.fs.rm(file_path, recurse=True)
#mssparkutils.fs.mkdirs(file_path)
spark.sql(f"""DROP TABLE gold.fact_fuel_consumption;""")

#file_path = f'abfss://gold@cql{env}datahubsynapse.dfs.core.windows.net/fact_retail_electricity_consumption/fact_retail_electricity_consumption'
#mssparkutils.fs.rm(file_path, recurse=True)
#mssparkutils.fs.mkdirs(file_path)
spark.sql(f"""DROP TABLE gold.fact_retail_electricity_consumption;""")
